pattern: Repeatedly chop the string into fixed-size chunks, replace each chunk with its digit sum written out, and concatenate, until the result is short enough to stop.
hints: Each round you process the current string left to right in blocks of k characters, where the final block may be shorter.
A block becomes the decimal string of the sum of its digits, and the new string is all those sums joined.
Keep repeating the round while the string length is strictly greater than k; otherwise return it.

edge_inputs.description: length already at most k, returned unchanged
exactly one over k so one round runs
block sums grow then shrink across rounds

stress.description: random digit strings of varying length with random small k
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = rng.randint(1, min(size, 100))
    s = ''.join(str(rng.randint(0, 9)) for _ in range(n))
    k = rng.randint(2, 100)
    return [s, k]
